description: A cinematic landing page for a luxury watch company featuring scroll-based animations.

files.description: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts.
Configuration file for the Vite build tool.
TypeScript compiler options and project file configuration.
Configuration for the Tailwind CSS framework, including theme customizations.
Configuration for PostCSS, used by Tailwind CSS.
Specifies intentionally untracked files to ignore.
Project documentation with setup and usage instructions.
The favicon for the website.
Cinematic background video for the hero section.
The main entry point of the React application.
The root component that sets up routing and global layout.
Global CSS styles and Tailwind CSS directives.
TypeScript declarations for Vite-specific environment variables.
The main landing page component that assembles all sections.
The main navigation header for the site.
The footer component with links and copyright information.
The main hero section with the cinematic video and headline.
A section showcasing featured watch collections with a carousel.
A section detailing the watchmaking process with scroll-triggered animations.
A reusable, styled button component.
A card component to display a single watch model.
A utility component for animating text characters or words on reveal.
A custom hook to trigger animations when an element scrolls into view.
Pre-defined animation variants for Framer Motion.
Defines and exports the core TypeScript types for the application.
Product image for the chronograph watch model.
Product image for the classic watch model.
Unit tests for the Button component.
